completed.name: Village Center
completed.priorityReason: Seeded stub with empty family-guide sections; medium family-search intent.

missingSections: What to know before you go

completed.reviewNote: Location appears PERMANENTLY CLOSED (verified 2026-07-04): official domain thevillagecentermd.com returns NXDOMAIN and Yelp lists it CLOSED. Opened May 2024, reviews stop late 2024. Writer produced an honest closure notice with a prominent HUMAN-REVIEW HTML comment and two verified live alternatives (Hyper Kidz Columbia, Robinson Nature Center — both links 200). Template sections "Tips for families" and "Best time to visit" intentionally omitted because there is nothing to plan; faithful reporting outranks template-filling. published left false. RECOMMEND: human unlist/remove this location or repurpose the page; do not publish.

completed.name: Robinson Nature Center
completed.priorityReason: Seeded stub with empty family-guide sections; medium family-search intent.

missingSections: What to know before you go

completed.reviewNote: Hours/admission/parking verified against the official Howard County Rec & Parks page on 2026-07-01 (Tue–Sun 9–5, closed Mon; $5 adult/$3 child). Older mom-blogs list Wed–Sat/Sun hours — used official current schedule, flagged in an HTML comment. Planetarium show pricing and changing-table/nursing specifics not stated on the official page; FAQs direct readers to call. Conservative structured frontmatter added (verified_at, stroller/wheelchair: partial, weather flags). published left false.

completed.reviewNote: Address corrected in body (typo 6905-C Oaklan Mills Rd -> 6905 Oakland Mills Rd, Ste C) and phone (410) 290-7008 added. Pricing/membership tuition not published online and exact class-schedule hours unverifiable (third-party '9am-7pm daily' appears generic) — both flagged in an HTML comment for staff confirmation before publishing. completed.name: Lake Elkhorn
completed.priorityReason: Seeded stub with empty family-guide sections; medium family-search intent.

missingSections: What to know before you go

completed.reviewNote: Posted hours unconfirmed on an official CA page (secondary birding source lists 6am–10pm); page uses conservative 'dawn to dusk'. Playground equipment details and the 'no restrooms / McDonald's backup' tip come from a parent blog + secondary sources, not an official CA page — confirm on site visit. No current algae/water-quality advisory found; none asserted. pair_with left unset. Corrected the common misconception that boat/kayak rentals are here (they're at the downtown Lakefront on Lake Kittamaqundi). Re-confirm before publishing.
